name: Brockweir & Bigsweir Riverside
terrain: Flat riverside, lanes, Wye Valley Walk
highlights: Gentle flat walk through a once-bustling river port — great for families.
points_of_interest: Brockweir Boat-building heritage; Bigsweir Bridge (1827 iron); old tramway bridge
parking_start: Brockweir village parking or Tintern Old Station
food_drink_nearby: Brockweir Country Inn; Moon & Sixpence Whitebrook; Anchor Inn Tintern
hazards_notes: Wye floods in winter — path can be submerged
